ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game session ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game session in seconds */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Type of game mode (e.g., competitive, casual) */,
  "winner" TEXT /* ID of the winner of the game session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game session the round belongs to */,
  "round_num" INTEGER /* Number of the round within the game session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round ended */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of round (e.g., normal, bonus) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., speaker, listener, observer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the player is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game session the message belongs to */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round the message was sent during */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sent the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the message is deleted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the message type (e.g., strategic, descriptive, casual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the message type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_type_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message being assigned a type */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_type_assignments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES message_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_type_assignments_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game session the feedback is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., speaker, listener, observer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., can_send_messages, can_view_feedback) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_sessions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player joined the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player left the game session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player game session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player game session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
